name: saving_throw
description: Roll a saving throw against the house's better judgement. Reference specimen for the dice form: `roll` is either a range object (see CUSTOM_TOOL_SPEC.json) or a dice string — never both — so the three features below cannot be shown in the same file as that one. Note also what is NOT here: with no `title`, Pascal announces this one as 'Saving Throw', title-cased from the name. Write a `title` only when the derived form is not what you want.

outcomes.message: Saved, and with something to spare. {{dice}}

Saved — the total was only {{value}}, but the house respects a blessing where it finds one. {{dice}} Demonstrates: `metadata` tests the rolling character's metadata.json in the dice form exactly as in the range form; a character whose sheet lacks `blessed` falls through to the ordinary band below.
Not saved. The total was {{value}}, and the dice are not interested in your opinion of them. {{dice}}
